ideas.title: Add moon_phase_emoji() pure fn + unit test to blog-logic
ideas.why: coverage_fns=9 are all astronomy math yet the UI renders moon_name/moon_illum with no glyph, so a pure phase→emoji mapping is a natural, fully-testable extension of the already-100%-gated crate.

ideas.title: Add a prefers-reduced-motion CSS block to the blog
ideas.why: The live vitals/moon UI animates but index.html ships no reduced-motion fallback, a one-selector reversible a11y fix.

ideas.title: Unit-test the LinkedIn de-slop stripper as a pure banned-phrase linter
ideas.why: The last 4 commits each bolt on an ad-hoc de-slop rule (em-dash strip, antithesis closer, banned words) with no test asserting the mechanical strip actually fires, so a regression would ship silently.

ideas.title: Surface coverage_pct, wasm_kb and CI success_rate as tiles on the ~/factory tab
ideas.why: These signals are computed and green (100% / 464KB / 0.97) but aren't shown on the live factory tab, so the dashboard under-reports its own health.

ideas.title: Add a WASM size-budget check to CI (fail over ~520KB with a logged trend)
ideas.why: wasm_kb=464 with 140 commits in 7 days and no size gate means the bundle can bloat silently between the coverage and deploy jobs.

ideas.title: Investigate spark node memory not being reclaimed at idle
ideas.why: spark-1 holds 105/124GB (84%) and spark-2 78% while both GPUs report util=0 and power ~10W, which points at leaked/zombie processes retaining host RAM with no active compute.
